sourceMovie.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Four Weddings and a Funeral works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Wild Child
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Four Weddings and a Funeral clicked for you, Wild Child (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Four Weddings and a Funeral?
faq.answer: Try Wild Child, Much Ado About Nothing, Melinda and Melinda—each shares DNA with Four Weddings and a Funeral while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Four Weddings and a Funeral?
faq.answer: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994) is best described as Comedy, Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Four Weddings and a Funeral worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
